content:
I think i would prefer sell Piercing Spear, for more sigils, but also cause i dont like the card, feels too expensive for a 2 cost, and there are a lot of better cards to play in this comp, so you may not be able to play the card very often
Also Strike is cheaper and give some aliemus for more exalts / shields for setups
without that you dont have vulnerable
but it is what it is
Indeed but i'm not sure you need it. I think it could depend on your relics i guess, or if you really need the extra sigils from skill card
